data.name: ResourceNotFound
data.value: The requested resource was not found.

data.name: OperationFailed
data.value: The operation could not be completed.

data.name: SubscriptionPaymentNotFound
data.value: The subscription payment was not found.

data.name: InvalidAmount
data.value: The amount must be greater than {0}.

data.name: InvalidPlan
data.value: Only Basic and Pro plans are allowed.
